voice.help: I am a voice assistant for tourism in Belarus. I can tell you about attractions. Say, for example: Tell me about Mir Castle or What is Nesvizh Castle

home.title: Discover
home.subtitle: A land of clean lakes, ancient castles and centuries-old traditions. Travel with us through the most beautiful places of Belarus.
home.what_we_offer_desc: Discover all facets of Belarus through our unique services
home.popular_desc: The most visited places not to be missed
home.suggestions_desc: We are always happy to hear your opinion! Tell us what can be improved.
home.ready_desc: Join thousands of tourists who have already discovered the beauty of Belarus.

slider.mir_desc: Unique architectural ensemble of the XVI-XVII centuries
slider.nesvizh_desc: A pearl of Belarusian Renaissance architecture
slider.pushcha_desc: Home of bison and ancient forest preserved since prehistoric times
slider.brest_desc: Symbol of courage and fortitude of Soviet soldiers
slider.grodno_subtitle: Old castle of the XIV century
slider.grodno_desc: Residence of the Grand Dukes of Lithuania
slider.sophia_desc: One of the oldest churches in Eastern Europe

testimonials.1: An unforgettable journey! Top-notch organization. I will definitely come back!
testimonials.2: Great service, convenient website. Booked a tour in 5 minutes. Thank you!
testimonials.3: Excellent guides, interesting routes. Belarus has won me over!

features.map_desc: Explore Belarus attractions with voice assistant
features.tours_desc: Book exciting tours to the most beautiful places
features.traditions_desc: Learn about rich traditions and customs
features.food_desc: Discover delicious Belarusian cuisine with recipes
features.legends_desc: Ancient legends and myths passed down through generations

feedback.name: Your name
feedback.subject: Subject
feedback.thanks_text: We will definitely consider your suggestion.
feedback.best_chosen: We bring the best suggestions to life
